content: This project involves the design and development of a modern enterprise platform with emphasis on scalability, security, and operational excellence. The following sections outline scope, phases, and deliverables in a format suitable for stakeholder review.

During the initial phase, the team will conduct stakeholder interviews, document current-state workflows, and produce a prioritized backlog with acceptance criteria. Workshops will align terminology across business and engineering teams.

children.content: Nested groups demonstrate recursive rendering while still participating in heading/body pairing at the flat list level when appropriate.
